idea-plugin.name: Magefile
idea-plugin.description:
Run Mage build targets directly from GoLand.

Requirements

  • Install mage. See installation docs.
  • Ensure mage is on your PATH, or configure the executable path in the run configuration.

Usage

  • Click the green run arrow in the gutter next to any exported Mage target function.
  • Or open Run/Debug Configurations and add a new Mage configuration manually.

What counts as a Mage target?

Any exported Go function in a file tagged with //go:build mage that returns nothing or error, optionally taking a context.Context as the first parameter. Methods on types that embed mg.Namespace are also supported as namespaced targets (e.g. Build.Deploy → mage build:deploy).
